primary_audit.summary: Blocked live truths do not automatically revoke the gate under the repo's own stage20_c6 evidence; the token remains earned while later live blockers stay explicit.

dissenting_audit.summary: Treated claim_gate/policy_drift/rotation/pool blockers as incompatible with gate admission.

adjudication.resolution: Accepted the PASS audit because stage20_c6 expressly records a non-repo-owned NO_GO path where the design gate is earned and later live blockers remain separate, and no higher-priority source explicitly revokes that token.
